visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Inside a brightly lit Costco warehouse, a young woman wearing a dark blue beret, a turquoise turtleneck, and a white quilted vest stands in front of stacks of boxed coffee. She holds a large blue and purple tin of KLIM milk powder, pointing at its features with her right hand while looking towards an off-camera companion. (2) The camera moves to close-up shots of the milk powder tin, focusing on the price tag showing a discount from 689 to 549 TWD. A man's hand enters the frame, pointing at the label which mentions '94% milk powder' and 'sesame extract' as key ingredients. (3) Transitioning to an indoor home setting, the woman sits at a gray marble-textured table, leaning her chin on her hands over the milk powder tin. She smiles and talks directly to the camera, wearing purple hair bows. (4) The final scene takes place inside a car at night. The woman is buckled into the passenger seat wearing a bulky orange puffer jacket. She looks visibly tired with drooping eyes, laughing as she describes the 'warm and sleepy' feeling after drinking the milk.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 比爾說他想要買這個. (2) [Variety]: 喝了真的會想睡? 克寧晚安全護奶粉. [Subtitle]: 他現在折140 從689變成549元. (3) [Subtitle]: 549! 這個裡面就是有加那個芝麻素啦. (4) [Subtitle]: 就是可以幫助你睡覺. 所以這個是比較適合睡覺前. (5) [Subtitle]: 來一杯熱熱的牛奶. 它可以泡45杯. (6) [Subtitle]: 然後它也是高鈣. 它好的原因是因為它的乳粉含量有94%. (7) [Subtitle]: 它就不會混那麼多什麼麥芽糊精啊這些. (8) [Subtitle]: 比爾說奶粉要好的話你就看那個乳粉. (9) [Subtitle]: 它的%越高其實就越純越好. 最重要是好不好喝我們回去試看看. (10) [Subtitle]: 超厲害的比爾剛剛還在幫其他客人介紹這個奶粉. (11) [Subtitle]: 請問你是克寧代言人嗎? 克寧有給你錢嗎? 沒有都沒有. (12) [Subtitle]: 我都喝克寧奶粉長大我們都沒有我們都沒有拿錢. (13) [Subtitle]: 我回家喝了以後我覺得它熱呼呼的睡前有一杯牛奶. (14) [Subtitle]: 都會很好睡. 那它本身喝起來我覺得甜度又在更高. (15) [Subtitle]: 我們現在在外面發現我跟比爾有喝過牛奶的人. (16) [Subtitle]: 變得特別的愛睡. 不知道是不是因為血糖有拉高. (17) [Subtitle]: 像妹妹一口都沒喝他精神力就很好. (18) [Subtitle]: 可是我跟比爾快昏倒了. 我很緊張因為不是我開的. (19) [Subtitle]: 哈哈哈. 也不是說昏倒就是想睡覺那個累累暖暖. (20) [Subtitle]: 很像吃飽想睡覺的感覺. 對.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 man's hand/voice visible (Bill), blurred shoppers in Costco background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a navy beret, a turquoise turtleneck shirt, and a white quilted puffer vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial Costco warehouse shelves filled with bulk coffee products; a modern home dining table; a dark car interior at night.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A cheerful female voice speaks enthusiastically over a light acoustic guitar background track. The voice is clear and projected. There is a slight background hum of a large enclosed public space. (2) The female voice continues, joined by a deeper male voice in a conversational manner. Both sound excited. A short digital whoosh transition sound effect is heard as the editing shifts perspective. (3) The acoustic environment shifts to a cleaner, quieter indoor resonance with less ambient air. The female voice becomes more narrative and calm. The BGM remains consistent in volume and tempo. (4) The audio texture changes to include a faint low-frequency engine hum and muffled exterior traffic. The woman's voice drops in energy, sounding slightly breathy and relaxed to match the content of being sleepy.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a personal recommendation for KLIM 'Good Night' milk powder purchased during a sale at Costco. The host details the product's nutritional value and its effectiveness in promoting sleep through her own post-consumption feedback.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host identifies a specific brand, showcases a pricing discount, and provides a positive testimonial on product efficacy.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging shopping vlog with effective use of variety-style subtitles and relatable personal storytelling.
